name: Thistlewick's Provisions & Curios
blurb: A cluttered stall of rope, lanterns, and things nobody can quite explain. If it doesn't cast a spell but might save your life, Bramwell probably has three of them under the counter.

name: The Temple of Oghma
blurb: Shelves of bottled miracles and worse. The proprietress mixes tonics behind a curtain and insists every bad smell in the shop is 'supposed to be there.'

name: Khe'ril Hammerbind Smithy
blurb: The ring of a hammer on enchanted steel never stops here. Dourgan and his kin forge, mend, and occasionally argue loudly with blades that talk back.

name: Quillheart Arcanum
blurb: A tower room stuffed floor to ceiling with scrolls, staves, and stranger things. Ozymandias reads while he talks, which makes conversation difficult but haggling easy.
